note: Shared server+UI case table for the `kind` column, stage C (decisions e852fb0c / ea83ac9f). Stored titles no longer carry a role prefix. `kind` is the ONLY source of role truth: no predicate, and nothing on any insert path, may read a title. `cases[].title` is display text only and several cases deliberately CONTRADICT their `kind` (a stale `[MISSION]` prefix on an `epic`) to prove it is never consulted. `backfillCases` are the sole place a title implies a kind, and they describe rows written BEFORE the strip - input to the one-way migration only, never to a runtime predicate.

cases.name: the Inbox epic is an epic by kind - BOMB 1 witness: kindFromTitle would say leaf
cases.title: Bugfix inbox
cases.label: [EPIC]

cases.name: leaf whose title merely CONTAINS the word inbox (topic-vs-role trap)
cases.title: Fix inbox planning-only guard

cases.name: leaf whose title MENTIONS a role prefix mid-string - never a role
cases.title: Stop reading [EPIC] out of titles

cases.name: topic tag survives - bracketed title that is NOT a role
cases.title: [UI] Plan list doesn't refresh

cases.name: stale prefix, column wins - title and kind deliberately disagree
cases.title: [MISSION] stale prefix, column wins
cases.label: [EPIC]

cases.name: stale prefix on a leaf, left over from a hand-edited title
cases.title: [LAND] left over from a hand-edited title

throwCases.name: kind key absent with a bare title (undefined)

backfillCases.name: leading whitespace is tolerated (regex ^\s*, SQL TRIM) - stripped has no leading/trailing space
backfillCases.title: [EPIC] leading spaces

backfillCases.name: prefix match is case-insensitive (regex /i, SQLite LIKE)
backfillCases.title: [epic] lowercase prefix

backfillCases.name: mission wins over epic when checked in order - exactly one prefix comes off (String.replace, not a loop)
backfillCases.title: [MISSION] [EPIC] ambiguous double prefix

backfillCases.name: topic tag untouched - never strip on title LIKE '[%]%'
backfillCases.title: [UI] Plan list doesn't refresh

backfillCases.name: this epic's own topic tag, stripped verbatim
backfillCases.title: [kind C] STRIP: remove role prefixes

backfillCases.name: no prefix at all, stripped verbatim - this is why insert-time inference is BOMB 1: the real row is an epic
backfillCases.title: Bugfix inbox
